name: rabbit-housekeep
summary: Repeatable measured verify-or-flag housekeeping skill. Runs slim/reduction against a feature, a set of features, or the whole repo in complexity-sized waves: each wave proves-it-dead-or-flags every claim, measures before/after line counts with a deterministic script, mandates actual removal (not rewording), and preserves named load-bearing tokens. Also enforces the spec-rules §4 Script-Backed Orchestration standard as a script-tier verify-or-flag dimension: check-script-backed.py scans SKILL/agent/command bodies for non-script-backed orchestration steps and routes each through the prove-it-dead-or-flag disposition. Cross-feature/repo-wide scope is decomposed into per-feature sub-issues, each worked through the governed TDD path.
deprecation_criterion: when housekeeping is provided natively by the rabbit CLI as a first-class measured-reduction subcommand
